title: Rename device - new name in FMD
scenario: Renaming a device in Poly Studio Mobile app Settings does not update the device name in the FMD (Find My Device) list
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. Navigate to the Home screen and ensure your Poly Bluetooth audio device is connected.
3. Tap on the device name or gear icon to open Device Settings.
4. In Device Settings, tap on the 'Rename' option (or navigate to Settings > Rename).
5. Enter a new name for the device (e.g., 'My Poly Headset') and confirm/save the change.
6. Close the Poly Studio Mobile app.
7. Open the Find My Device (FMD) app or feature on your Android device.
8. Locate your Poly device in the list of available devices.
9. Observe the device name displayed in the FMD list.
expected: The device name in the Find My Device list should display the new name (e.g., 'My Poly Headset') instead of the previous/old name.
